rows.source_ref: SwingMan, "Golden-Cross Trading-Idea", ForexFactory thread 1207682, 2025, https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/1207682/golden-cross-trading-idea (method draws on Dimitris Tsokakis, "Anticipating Moving Average Crossover", Technical Analysis of Stocks & Commodities, Feb 2007)
rows.concept: Go with the trend defined by a period-5 LWMA of Close crossing a period-5 LWMA of Open, taken only in the direction of the higher-timeframe trend (Elder triple screen), entering via a stop order at the mathematically anticipated crossover price.
rows.eligibility_reason: Core is pure-MQL5 deterministic (LWMA(5,Close) x LWMA(5,Open) cross + MTF trend filter + ATR/channel stops), FX data on .DWX, FTMO/DXZ-compatible with stops; but exact entry trigger, SL/TP multiples and MM are left to the trader.
rows.notes: Author explicitly says entry/risk/exit and money-management are 'the job of the trader' — it is an indicator toolkit, not a finished system. Lagging MA-crossover = generic trend follower, no structural/limit-to-arbitrage edge; forum member (MickyMouseFX) flags the lag eats most of each move. Distinctive twist is placing a buy-stop/sell-stop at the predicted crossing price (Tsokakis anticipation). Suggested TP/SL = min(ATR, ChannelOsc channel range). Inherently multi-timeframe (Elder triple screen: D1-H4-H1, W1-D1-H4, H4-H1-M15 etc.); primary example trades D1 with entries on H4 in direction of W1 trend, plus incidental London-open FX entries (EURUSD/EURGBP/EURJPY/GBPJPY/USDCAD/AUDUSD). Variant mentioned by emmanuel7788: 5LWMA Close shift0 / 5EMA Typical shift+2 for signal. 'SmallWick' companion indicator is named but never given mechanical rules; no separate candidate. All artifacts are .ex4/MT4 indicators (no EA); source code not posted.
